_comment: DORA Deploy Event Schema
WHY THIS SCHEMA EXISTS:
Defines the contract for deploy events sent to Splunk HEC. Every deploy
(success or failure) emits an event matching this schema. Splunk indexes
these events and the DORA dashboard queries them to compute:
- Deployment Frequency (DF): count of events per time period
- Lead Time for Changes (LT): first_commit_at → deployed_at delta
- Change Failure Rate (CFR): failed / total deploys
- Mean Time to Recovery (MTTR): derived from incident linkage
FIELD NAMING CONVENTION:
snake_case for all fields. Prefixed by category:
deploy_*   → deployment metadata
service_*  → service identification (domain taxonomy)
git_*      → source control metadata
ci_*       → CI/CD pipeline metadata
dora_*     → pre-computed DORA metric inputs
SPLUNK INDEX:
Events are sent to a dedicated index (e.g., 'dora_events') to isolate
deploy telemetry from application logs. This enables retention policies
and access controls specific to engineering metrics.
title: DORA Deploy Event
description: Schema for deploy events emitted to Splunk HEC for DORA metrics computation

event_type.description: Event type discriminator for Splunk queries

deploy_id.description: Unique identifier for this deployment (GitHub run_id + attempt)

deploy_status.description: Final status. 'rollback' counts as failure for CFR

deploy_environment.description: Target environment. Only 'production' counts for DORA

deploy_finished_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when deploy completed (success or failure)

git_commit_sha.description: Full SHA of the deployed commit

git_release_tag.description: Semantic version tag if this deploy corresponds to a release

git_pr_number.description: PR number that introduced the changes (from squash merge)

git_first_commit_at.description: Timestamp of the first commit in the PR. Used to compute Lead Time: deploy_finished_at - git_first_commit_at

ci_run_url.description: URL to the GitHub Actions run for traceability

ci_actor.description: GitHub user who triggered or approved the deploy

dora_lead_time_ms.description: Pre-computed Lead Time: deploy_finished_at - git_first_commit_at (ms). Null if first_commit_at is unavailable

dora_is_failure.description: True if deploy_status is 'failure' or 'rollback'. Simplifies CFR queries

correlation_id.description: Links this deploy to incidents/postmortems. Matches deploy_id in postmortem YAML frontmatter
